prompt: A minimalist, hand-drawn comic panel rendered in thick, bold, slightly wobbly black marker lines on a pure white background, mimicking a quick sketch on a whiteboard. The fox has a simple facial expression. The fox is sitting at a desk typing on a laptop with a concentrated expression, wearing tiny round glasses. The banner must have at least 30% blank space above it to avoid being cropped.
